hero.title: Saudi Arabia's #1 Real Estate Marketplace
hero.subtitle: Find your perfect property, connect with owners and brokers, and close deals safely and easily.

features.title: Everything You Need in One Platform
features.subtitle: Aqora brings together all real estate tools in one easy-to-use app

search.title: Instant Map Search
search.desc: Search near you or any neighborhood in Saudi Arabia with an interactive map and advanced filters

chat.title: Direct Messaging
chat.desc: Message owners and brokers instantly inside the app without sharing your phone number

wallet.title: Digital Wallet
wallet.desc: Pay, recharge, and use your balance for promotions and subscriptions securely

promotions.title: Featured Listings
promotions.desc: Boost your property visibility with Featured, Golden, or Buyers Alert promotions

crm.title: Broker Tools
crm.desc: Manage clients, deals, and reminders — everything a professional broker needs

licensed.title: REGA Licensed Listings
licensed.desc: Verified listings certified by the General Real Estate Authority (Fal) for trust and safety

users.subtitle: A platform serving all sides of the real estate market

owners.title: Property Owners
owners.desc: List your property for sale or rent and connect directly with interested buyers

brokers.title: Brokers & Agents
brokers.desc: Manage listings and clients with professional subscriptions and CRM tools

buyers.title: Buyers & Renters
buyers.desc: Find your dream home or investment property with ease

hosts.title: Hosts
hosts.desc: Rent your property daily and earn additional income with booking management

developers.title: Property Developers
developers.desc: Showcase your projects and units to thousands of interested buyers

screenshots.title: Professional & Easy to Use
screenshots.subtitle: An elegant Arabic interface designed specifically for the Saudi market

dailyRents.title: Daily rents
dailyRents.subtitle: Book short-stay properties by the day

eventHalls.title: Event halls and venues
eventHalls.subtitle: Book the right venue for weddings, events, and celebrations

cta.title: Ready to Start?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of users who trust Aqora for better real estate decisions

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.intro: At Aqora, we take your privacy seriously. This policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your data.

collect.title: Data We Collect
items: Phone number (for registration and verification)
Name and profile photo (optional)
Location data (for nearby search)
Property photos you upload
Usage and browsing data within the app
Device information and push notification tokens

use.title: How We Use Your Data
items: Operating the app and providing its services
Personalizing search results based on your location
Sending message notifications and alerts
Processing payments through the wallet
Improving user experience and app performance
Complying with Saudi legal requirements

third.title: Third Parties
items: Algolia — instant search engine
Google Cloud Platform — image and file storage
Google Maps — map display and locations
Firebase — push notifications
Socket.io — real-time messaging

rights.title: Your Rights
items: Request access to your personal data
Correct or update your information
Delete your account and all associated data
Withdraw consent for location data usage

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: For any privacy-related inquiries, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.intro: By using the Aqora app, you agree to these Terms of Service. Please read them carefully.

usage.title: App Usage
items: You must be 18 years of age or older
Provide accurate and truthful information when registering
Keep your password and account credentials confidential
Do not share your account with any other person

listings.title: Listing Rules
items: All listings must be for real, existing properties
Fake or misleading listings are strictly prohibited
Photos must be genuine images of the listed property
Brokers must hold a valid REGA (Fal) license
Aqora reserves the right to remove any violating listing without notice

payments.title: Payments & Wallet
items: Wallet balance is non-refundable as cash
Amounts paid for promotions are non-refundable once activated
Aqora is not responsible for transactions conducted outside the platform
All payments are in Saudi Riyals (SAR)

prohibited.title: Prohibited Content
items: Offensive or inappropriate content
Fraud or misleading listings
Intellectual property violations
Any activity violating Saudi regulations

termination.title: Account Termination
termination.text: Aqora reserves the right to suspend or terminate any account that violates these Terms or applicable Saudi regulations.

law.title: Governing Law
law.text: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, and Saudi courts have exclusive jurisdiction over any disputes arising hereunder.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.text: We believe that finding a property should be an easy, transparent, and trustworthy experience. Aqora brings owners, brokers, and buyers together on one platform that provides everything the Saudi real estate market needs.

story.title: Our Story
story.text: Aqora was founded with the goal of transforming the real estate experience in Saudi Arabia. We are a team of developers and real estate specialists who believe in the power of technology to simplify real estate transactions and make them more transparent and efficient.

trust.title: Trust
trust.desc: We verify listings through REGA (Fal) license validation

transparency.title: Transparency
transparency.desc: Clear and honest information with no hidden fees

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.desc: Advanced technology for a seamless search and communication experience

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: We're here to help with any questions

form.name: Name
form.success: Your message was sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
form.error: An error occurred, please try again.

deleteAccount.title: Delete Account
deleteAccount.subtitle: We're sorry to see you go. You can fully delete your account by following the steps below.

steps.title: How to Request Account Deletion
items: Open the Aqora app and go to Settings
Select "My Account" then "Delete Account"
Confirm the deletion request inside the app

alternative.title: Or Contact Us Directly
alternative.text: If you can't access the app, send a deletion request to:

deleted.title: What Gets Deleted?
items: Your personal data (name, phone number, photo)
All your property listings
Chat history and messages
Wallet balance (non-refundable)
All data stored on our servers

deleteAccount.note: Deletion is processed within 30 days of the request in accordance with our data retention policy.

eventHalls.title: Event Halls & Celebration Venues
eventHalls.subtitle: Find the perfect venue for weddings and events
eventHalls.contactInfo: For availability and booking contact the owner directly

booking.paymentNote: The booking amount is held from your wallet only after the host confirms
booking.successBody: You will be notified when the host confirms. After confirmation, the booking amount is held from your wallet balance.
